Tini Atelier – Design meets circularity

Tini is a Swedish fashion brand aiming to democratize sustainable style. They provide a collection of carefully designed and fundamental garments. Made on demand, adjusted and tailored just for you.

I worked across brand, product, and digital design to help shape the end-to-end experience. This included exploring app concepts, designing a web platform for customers, and creating a dedicated tool for tailors to manage orders, measurements, and communication.

The challenge was to translate a traditionally manual and fragmented tailoring process into a clear and scalable digital experience. I focused on simplifying workflows for both customers and tailors, ensuring the platform felt cohesive across all touchpoints.

Deliverables
Brand Design
Interface Design
Art Direction
Product Design

2020–2021
Booking system (sunsetted 2025)
